---
title: "Tasks"
description: "A kanban task board with auto-generated tasks from your project data."
order: 10
---

## Task Board

The task board uses a three-column kanban layout:

- **Todo** — tasks that need to be done
- **Doing** — tasks currently in progress
- **Done** — completed tasks

Drag tasks between columns to update their status, or click a task to edit its details.

## Creating Tasks

Click "Add Task" to create a new task. Give it a title, optional description, and assign it to a team member. Tasks start in the "Todo" column by default.

## Auto-Generated Tasks

indieFilmer can automatically generate tasks based on your project data. For example:

- Uncasted roles generate "Cast [role name]" tasks
- Scenes without locations generate "Find location for Scene [number]" tasks
- Shoot days without crew generate "Assign crew to [date]" tasks

Auto-generated tasks help you catch things that might fall through the cracks.

## Linked Entities

Tasks can be linked to specific entities — a cast member, a location, a crew member. Clicking the link takes you directly to that entity's detail page for context.
